paragraphs: I am a Civil and Environmental Engineering graduate from the University of Ruhuna, Sri Lanka, with experience in BIM modelling, CAD drafting, structural analysis, surveying, and digital construction technologies.

I have 4 years of freelance CAD design experience as a Fiverr Level 2 Seller, completing more than 250 projects for international clients. My career goal is to become a university lecturer and construction technology specialist by integrating civil engineering, BIM, artificial intelligence, and digital construction practices.
